title: Evangelion Release Versions List
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Release Versions List?             Quote Post by Parracaesar » Sun Mar 02, 2025 1:04 am Hello! I'm new here but very interested in everything Evangelion. I have been working to archive as many major home releases as well as the various versions of the shows/movies that exist (TV Broadcast,1.0-3.33, Remasters, etc) I have a small list of current content that's known to have been released but is there a fully complete list floating around anywhere? I've only see partial lists that haven't been updated for years so I've mashed them together for now but I'm missing quite a few releases/versions from the list still. Thanks in advance, -Parracaesar

[]: Re: Evangelion Release Versions List?             Quote Post by DTGee » Mon Mar 03, 2025 9:26 pm Any specific region? Japan? North America? Everywhere?

[]: Re: Evangelion Release Versions List?             Quote Post by Parracaesar » Mon Mar 03, 2025 11:52 pm DTGee wrote: Any specific region? Japan? North America? Everywhere?

[]: Re: Evangelion Release Versions List?             Quote Post by DTGee » Tue Mar 04, 2025 4:26 am Yeah, post what you've already got and we can help you fill in any gaps.

[]: Re: Evangelion Release Versions List?             Quote Post by Parracaesar » Tue Mar 04, 2025 5:04 pm DTGee wrote: Yeah, post what you've already got and we can help you fill in any gaps.

Article: Evangelion Release Versions List
[]: Evangelion Release Versions List?             Quote Post by Parracaesar » Sun Mar 02, 2025 1:04 am Hello! I'm new here but very interested in everything Evangelion. I have been working to archive as many major home releases as well as the various versions of the shows/movies that exist (TV Broadcast,1.0-3.33, Remasters, etc) I have a small list of current content that's known to have been released but is there a fully complete list floating around anywhere? I've only see partial lists that haven't been updated for years so I've mashed them together for now but I'm missing quite a few releases/versions from the list still. Thanks in advance, -Parracaesar

[]: Re: Evangelion Release Versions List?             Quote Post by DTGee » Mon Mar 03, 2025 9:26 pm Any specific region? Japan? North America? Everywhere?
